question: How many part-time swordsmiths are there in Japan?
response: The exact number of part-time swordsmiths in Japan is not documented, but it is estimated to be very small or non-existent due to the rigorous and time-intensive nature of the craft. The 30 full-time swordsmiths highlighted in available records likely represent the vast majority of active practitioners.
